verdicts.issue: Year 2019 is wrong; the 6th edition (ISBN 978-0128119051) of Computer Architecture: A Quantitative Approach was published in 2017 (Morgan Kaufmann/Elsevier, December 2017). Per bib-check §5, the year must match the entry's actual publication year. The key prefix "hennessy2019" must be renamed to match. Renaming requires updating every [@hennessy2019architecture] reference in associated source files (.qmd, .tex, etc).

Title casing is wrong: should be "1.1 Computing's Energy Problem (and What We Can Do About It)" or at least Title Case per §1 first-word-after-colon protection ("computing's energy problem" all-lowercase is published title style on the IEEE PDF, but "and what we can do about it" is parenthetical and the leading numeral 1.1 is part of the published heading). Missing publisher (IEEE) per §3 and DOI (10.1109/ISSCC.2014.6757323). Journal field used but should be @inproceedings since this is a conference paper at ISSCC.

suggested_fix.booktitle: 2014 IEEE International Solid-State Circuits Conference Digest of Technical Papers (ISSCC)

verdicts.issue: Booktitle "Proceedings of Machine Learning and Systems" should explicitly include the (MLSys) acronym per §2: "Proceedings of Machine Learning and Systems (MLSys)". Also missing volume (3) and url/pages.

suggested_fix.booktitle: Proceedings of Machine Learning and Systems (MLSys)

verdicts.issue: Author field uses "Jouppi, Norman P and others" — incomplete (75 named coauthors per ACM record). Title casing: TPU acronym not protected per §1. verdicts.issue: Publisher "Harvard University" is wrong. Per the textbook's official designation and the parallel entry in interviews/paper/references.bib, the publisher is MIT Press. Author should follow the same convention as elsewhere in the corpus: "Reddi, Vijay Janapa" (the periodic-table entry uses "Janapa Reddi, Vijay" which differs from interviews bib). Inconsistent author-name surnaming across two project bibs.

URL https://staffml.ai cited; could not independently verify the project page resolves with cited content. Project-name key (staffml is the artifact). Treat as project self-citation; acceptable per §5 corporate/project-name exception.

Entry type is @inproceedings but booktitle = "arXiv preprint arXiv:1909.08053" — this is incorrect schema. arXiv preprints should be @article with journal field set, or @misc with eprint/archiveprefix. Megatron-LM was an arXiv preprint (later much-cited but never published at a venue). The interviews/paper/references.bib has the correct form for the same paper.

Entry type @article with journal = "Mechanical Sympathy Blog" but this is a blog post, not a journal article. Per bib-check §4 blog posts should use @misc or @online with url. The interviews bib has the same item correctly typed as @misc with url and note. Missing url field here.
Missing pages (5998--6008 in NeurIPS proceedings) and url. Booktitle should include (NeurIPS) tag per §2. Otherwise content correct.

suggested_fix.booktitle: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS)
